description: FORTRESS-level detection engine with 68 rules covering all known secret types
changelog: v2.0.1: Consolidated 229 duplicate Azure rules into 7 distinct patterns. Fixed broken patterns (SSN, credit card, K8s, secret-in-comment). Added AI provider keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace), registry tokens (npm, PyPI), JWT detection, Supabase, Firebase, AWS secret key values, generic password assignment.

rules.name: AWS Long-Term Access Key ID (AKIA prefix)
rules.remediation: Rotate this AWS access key in IAM console and migrate to temporary credentials or IAM roles
rules.description: AWS long-term access key ID — indicates permanent IAM credentials that should be rotated to temporary credentials or IAM roles

rules.name: AWS Access Key ID
rules.remediation: Review and secure this AWS Access Key ID

rules.name: GCP API Key
rules.remediation: Review and secure this GCP API Key

rules.name: GitHub Personal Access Token
rules.remediation: Review and secure this GitHub Personal Access Token

rules.name: GitLab Personal Access Token
rules.remediation: Review and secure this GitLab Personal Access Token

rules.name: MongoDB Connection URI
rules.remediation: Review and secure this MongoDB Connection URI

rules.name: RSA Private Key
rules.remediation: Review and secure this RSA Private Key

rules.name: Stripe Live Secret Key
rules.remediation: Review and secure this Stripe Live Secret Key
rules.description: Stripe live secret key — grants full API access to production Stripe account

rules.name: DigitalOcean API Token
rules.remediation: Review and secure this DigitalOcean API Token

rules.name: GitHub Actions Secret Reference
rules.remediation: Review and secure this GitHub Actions Secret Reference
rules.description: GitHub Actions secrets reference — not a leaked secret itself, but verify the referenced value is not hardcoded elsewhere

rules.name: US Social Security Number
rules.remediation: Review and secure this US Social Security Number
rules.description: Potential US Social Security Number — excludes invalid SSN ranges (000, 666, 900-999)

rules.name: US Credit Card Number
rules.remediation: Review and secure this US Credit Card Number
rules.description: Credit card number with issuer prefix validation (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover)

rules.name: SQL Injection - String Concatenation
rules.example_match: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = \" + userId + \"
rules.remediation: Review and secure this SQL Injection - String Concatenation

rules.name: Kubernetes Secret in YAML
rules.remediation: Review and secure this Kubernetes Secret in YAML
rules.description: Kubernetes Secret manifest detected — verify no sensitive data is hardcoded in the data section

rules.name: SendGrid API Key
rules.remediation: Review and secure this SendGrid API Key

rules.name: Hardcoded URL with Credentials
rules.remediation: Review and secure this Hardcoded URL with Credentials

rules.name: Secret in Code Comment
rules.remediation: Review and secure this Secret in Code Comment
rules.description: Secret value assigned in a code comment — indicates credentials left in comments

rules.name: Base64 Encoded Secret
rules.remediation: Review and secure this Base64 Encoded Secret

rules.name: Twilio auth token
rules.remediation: Rotate Twilio auth_token

rules.name: Mailgun api key
rules.remediation: Rotate Mailgun api_key

rules.name: Slack token
rules.remediation: Rotate Slack token

rules.name: Discord token
rules.remediation: Rotate Discord token

rules.name: Telegram token
rules.remediation: Rotate Telegram token

rules.name: PagerDuty api key
rules.remediation: Rotate PagerDuty api_key

rules.name: Datadog api key
rules.remediation: Rotate Datadog api_key

rules.name: New Relic api key
rules.remediation: Rotate New Relic api_key

rules.name: Sentry dsn
rules.remediation: Rotate Sentry dsn

rules.name: Azure Storage Account Key
rules.description: Azure Storage account key (base64, 88 chars with == suffix) — grants full access to storage account
rules.remediation: Rotate Azure Storage account key in Azure Portal and use managed identities or SAS tokens

rules.name: Azure SAS Token
rules.description: Azure Shared Access Signature (SAS) token — grants time-limited access to Azure storage resources
rules.remediation: Revoke SAS token and generate a new one with minimum required permissions and shorter expiry

rules.name: Azure AD Client Secret
rules.description: Azure Active Directory application client secret — grants access to Azure resources via service principal
rules.remediation: Rotate the client secret in Azure AD App Registrations and migrate to managed identity or certificate auth

rules.name: Azure Connection String
rules.description: Full Azure Storage connection string containing account key — grants complete storage access
rules.remediation: Rotate storage account key, use managed identity or Azure Key Vault for connection strings

rules.name: Azure DevOps Personal Access Token
rules.description: Azure DevOps personal access token — grants access to Azure DevOps repos, pipelines, and work items
rules.remediation: Revoke PAT in Azure DevOps User Settings and create new token with minimum scope

rules.name: Azure Cosmos DB Key
rules.description: Azure Cosmos DB primary or secondary key — grants full database access
rules.remediation: Rotate Cosmos DB key in Azure Portal and update all consuming applications

rules.name: Azure Key Assignment
rules.description: Generic Azure key assignment — verify if this is a real credential or configuration value
rules.remediation: Identify the specific Azure service and rotate the key in Azure Portal

rules.name: Vercel API Token
rules.description: Vercel deployment token — grants full access to Vercel projects and deployments
rules.remediation: Rotate Vercel token in dashboard

rules.name: Netlify Personal Access Token
rules.description: Netlify personal access token — grants full account and site management access
rules.remediation: Rotate Netlify token in dashboard

rules.name: Cloudflare Global API Key
rules.description: Cloudflare Global API key (40 hex chars) — provides full account access including DNS, WAF, and Workers
rules.remediation: Rotate Cloudflare API key in dashboard

rules.name: Cloudflare API Token
rules.description: Cloudflare scoped API token — grants permissions defined at token creation (e.g., DNS edit, Workers deploy)
rules.remediation: Rotate Cloudflare API token in dashboard

rules.name: Linear API Key
rules.description: Linear project management API key — grants read/write access to issues, projects, and team data
rules.remediation: Rotate Linear API key in settings

rules.name: Notion API Key
rules.description: Notion integration API token — grants access to shared Notion pages and databases
rules.remediation: Rotate Notion API key in integrations settings

rules.name: Doppler Service Token
rules.description: Doppler service token — grants access to a specific Doppler config/environment's secrets
rules.remediation: Rotate Doppler token in dashboard

rules.name: HashiCorp Vault Service Token
rules.description: HashiCorp Vault service token — grants access to vault secrets paths defined by attached policies
rules.remediation: Revoke Vault token immediately

rules.name: Terraform Cloud API Token
rules.description: Terraform Cloud (Atlas) API token — grants access to Terraform workspaces, state, and runs
rules.remediation: Rotate Terraform Cloud token in user settings

rules.name: PlanetScale Database Token
rules.description: PlanetScale database service token — grants database read/write access
rules.remediation: Rotate PlanetScale token in dashboard

rules.name: Railway API Token
rules.description: Railway deployment platform API token — grants access to deployments, environment variables, and services
rules.remediation: Rotate Railway token in account settings

rules.name: Fly.io Deploy Token
rules.description: Fly.io deploy token — grants access to Fly.io applications and deployment operations
rules.remediation: Rotate Fly.io token with fly tokens revoke

rules.name: Clerk Secret Key
rules.description: Clerk secret key (distinguished from Stripe by length >= 45 characters after prefix)
rules.remediation: Rotate Clerk secret key in dashboard

rules.name: Resend API Key
rules.description: Resend API key — look for the re_ prefix with underscore-separated segments
rules.remediation: Rotate Resend API key in dashboard

rules.name: Upstash Redis/Kafka Token
rules.description: Upstash Redis or Kafka REST token — grants read/write access to serverless Redis or Kafka clusters
rules.remediation: Rotate Upstash token in console

rules.name: Neon Database API Key
rules.description: Neon serverless Postgres API key — grants access to Neon projects and branch management
rules.remediation: Rotate Neon API key in account settings

rules.name: Turso Auth Token
rules.description: Turso (libSQL) database auth token — JWT granting access to Turso edge database
rules.remediation: Rotate Turso auth token with turso db tokens create

rules.name: Replicate API Token
rules.description: Replicate AI model inference API token — allows running AI models and may incur billing charges
rules.remediation: Rotate Replicate token in account settings

rules.name: Mistral AI API Key
rules.description: Mistral AI API key — grants access to Mistral language model inference API
rules.remediation: Rotate Mistral API key in console

rules.name: Groq API Key
rules.description: Groq LPU inference API key — grants access to ultra-fast Groq AI model inference
rules.remediation: Rotate Groq API key in console

rules.name: Cohere API Key
rules.description: Cohere AI API key — grants access to Cohere text generation, embedding, and reranking APIs
rules.remediation: Rotate Cohere API key in dashboard

rules.name: GitLab Pipeline Trigger Token
rules.description: GitLab pipeline trigger token — allows triggering CI/CD pipeline runs on a project
rules.remediation: Revoke GitLab pipeline token in project CI/CD settings

rules.name: Postman API Key
rules.description: Postman API key — grants access to Postman workspaces, collections, and environments
rules.remediation: Revoke Postman API key in account settings

rules.name: Databricks Personal Access Token
rules.description: Databricks personal access token — grants access to Databricks workspace APIs and cluster management
rules.remediation: Revoke Databricks token in user settings

rules.name: OpenAI API Key
rules.description: OpenAI API key — grants access to GPT, DALL-E, and other OpenAI APIs; may incur usage charges
rules.remediation: Revoke key at platform.openai.com/api-keys and create a new one with appropriate permissions

rules.name: Anthropic API Key
rules.description: Anthropic API key — grants access to Claude models; may incur usage charges
rules.remediation: Revoke key at console.anthropic.com/settings/keys and create a new one

rules.name: Hugging Face API Token
rules.description: Hugging Face API token — grants access to models, datasets, and Inference API
rules.remediation: Revoke token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens and create a new one

rules.name: npm Access Token
rules.description: npm access token — can publish packages, modify account settings, and access private packages
rules.remediation: Revoke token at npmjs.com/settings/tokens and create a new one with minimum scope

rules.name: PyPI API Token
rules.description: PyPI API token — can upload and manage Python packages on PyPI
rules.remediation: Revoke token at pypi.org/manage/account/token/ and create a new one scoped to specific projects

rules.name: AWS Secret Access Key (Value)
rules.description: AWS Secret Access Key value — the 40-character secret that pairs with an Access Key ID for AWS API access
rules.remediation: Rotate the access key in AWS IAM console and use environment variables or IAM roles instead

rules.name: JSON Web Token
rules.description: JSON Web Token (JWT) — may contain session data or API credentials; verify if it contains sensitive claims
rules.remediation: Decode the JWT to check expiry and claims; if it contains sensitive data, rotate the signing key

rules.name: Supabase Service Role Key
rules.description: Supabase service role key (JWT) — bypasses Row Level Security and grants full database access
rules.remediation: Rotate service role key in Supabase dashboard; never expose in client-side code

rules.name: Firebase/GCP Service Account Private Key
rules.description: Firebase or GCP service account private key in JSON — grants full access to the associated Google Cloud project
rules.remediation: Revoke service account key in Google Cloud Console and create a new one; use Workload Identity where possible

rules.name: Password Assignment
rules.description: Hardcoded password assignment — passwords should be stored in environment variables or a secrets manager
rules.remediation: Extract password to environment variable or secrets manager; never hardcode credentials
